title: KeyALLX
description: A simple keyall plugin for all owners
body:
**KeyALLX - Versatile Key Distribution System** KeyALLX is a powerful plugin that allows server administrators to distribute rewards to all online players through a flexible key system. Whether you want to schedule automatic rewards based on player count, time intervals, or specific times of day, KeyALLX offers a simple yet comprehensive solution. What This Plugin Does **Command and Item Keys**: Create two types of keys - command-based keys that execute commands or item-based keys that give physical items Flexible Scheduling: Automatically distribute keys based on player count thresholds, time intervals, or exact times of day Admin Controls: Easily manage keys with simple commands for adding new keys and giving keys to specific players Broadcast Notifications: Automatic server-wide messages when keys are distributed ** Why You Should Download ** Simple Configuration: Easy-to-understand YAML configuration for keys and schedules No Dependencies: Works right out of the box with no additional plugins required Server Engagement: Keep players engaged and excited with scheduled rewards Customizable Keys: Define your own items with custom names and lore as keys **Usage** Use /keyall to list all available keys or execute a key distribution Use /key add to create a new key from the item in your hand Use /key give to give a specific key to a player Perfect for servers looking to enhance player engagement through scheduled rewards and special events!
Advertisement:
